Services & Pricing

Prices may vary depending on hair length and what is involved. Call us for a quote if you are not sure.

Cuts

Take a look at what we offer. If you do not see what you need, just call and ask.

Women's Cut & Style

60 min

A cut that works for your hair type and your daily routine

$45-65

Men's Cut

30 min

Clean, sharp, easy to maintain

$30-40

Kid's Cut (12 & under)

30 min

We are patient with the little ones

$25-35

Bang Trim

15 min

Quick cleanup between full cuts

$15

Beard Trim

15 min

Neat, shaped, looking sharp

$15-20

Color

Take a look at what we offer. If you do not see what you need, just call and ask.

Full Color

90 min

All-over color with products we trust

$75-95

Root Touch-up

75 min

Keep your color fresh without doing everything over

$65-85

Partial Highlights

90 min

A few highlights to add some dimension

$85-115

Full Highlights

2 hrs

Full head of highlights for a bigger change

$120-160

Balayage

2.5 hrs

Hand-painted color that looks natural as it grows out

$150-200

Color Correction

Varies

If something went wrong, we can fix it. Call us first.

Consultation

Styling & Treatments

Take a look at what we offer. If you do not see what you need, just call and ask.

Blowout

45 min

Smooth, bouncy, ready to go

$35-50

Special Occasion Styling

60 min

Weddings, proms, big nights out

$65-85

Deep Conditioning Treatment

30 min

Bring dry, damaged hair back to life

$25-35

Keratin Treatment

3 hrs

Smooth, frizz-free hair that lasts for months

$200-300

Scalp Treatment

30 min

Healthy hair starts at the roots

$35
